statement: The system shall allow core field data capture without network connectivity
acceptance_criteria: Field forms usable offline for >=72h; queued records retained until sync

statement: The system shall synchronise offline data with deterministic conflict resolution
acceptance_criteria: No data loss on sync; conflicts flagged/resolved by defined policy

statement: Interactive operations shall respond within acceptable latency on low bandwidth
acceptance_criteria: Core screens usable at <=2 Mbps; key actions ack <3s server-side

statement: USSD/SMS interactions shall complete within session limits
acceptance_criteria: USSD menu step responds <5s to avoid session timeout

statement: The platform shall target high availability for core services
acceptance_criteria: Monthly availability target documented (e.g. >=99.5%) and measured

statement: The system shall not lose committed transactions
acceptance_criteria: Zero committed-transaction loss under normal operation; verified by test

statement: The system shall scale to national user and record volumes
acceptance_criteria: Horizontal scaling demonstrated for growing tenants/records

statement: Data in transit shall be encrypted
acceptance_criteria: All traffic uses TLS 1.3; no plaintext endpoints

statement: Data at rest shall be encrypted
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive stores encrypted (AES-256 or equivalent)

statement: Access shall follow least privilege via RBAC
acceptance_criteria: Roles enforce least-privilege; access reviews supported

statement: Privileged access shall require MFA
acceptance_criteria: MFA enforced for admin/privileged roles

statement: Secrets shall be managed securely
acceptance_criteria: No secrets in code; secrets stored in a managed vault

statement: Personal data processing shall comply with the Data Protection Act
acceptance_criteria: Consent captured; data-subject rights supported; DPA lawful basis documented

statement: Data residency requirements shall be configurable
acceptance_criteria: Deployment can meet local data-residency where required

statement: Interfaces shall be usable on low-end devices and by low-literacy users
acceptance_criteria: Feature-phone (USSD/SMS) path exists; simple flows for key tasks

statement: The system shall support recovery within defined objectives
acceptance_criteria: RPO/RTO targets documented and tested

statement: Data shall be backed up regularly and restorable
acceptance_criteria: Automated backups with periodic restore verification

statement: System health and usage shall be observable
acceptance_criteria: Metrics/logs/traces collected; alerting configured

statement: Security-relevant events shall be logged immutably
acceptance_criteria: Audit log tamper-evident and retained per policy

statement: The system shall be modular and documented for maintenance
acceptance_criteria: Components independently deployable/updatable; docs maintained

statement: Business rules and reference data shall be configurable without code change
acceptance_criteria: Admins configure rules/lists via configuration

statement: The system shall support multiple languages and locale formats
acceptance_criteria: Locale-aware dates/numbers; local-language content supported

statement: The system shall support evidence for regulatory audits
acceptance_criteria: Compliance reports and audit trails exportable to regulators

statement: The system shall exchange data via open standards
acceptance_criteria: Supports REST/JSON/CSV/GeoJSON/OGC as applicable

statement: The system shall integrate with mobile-money and comms providers
acceptance_criteria: Documented integration with at least MNO money + SMS/USSD

statement: The system shall be deployable across cloud and on-prem/edge
acceptance_criteria: Deployable via containers to cloud and local infrastructure

statement: The system shall validate data at capture
acceptance_criteria: Mandatory/format validation enforced at entry

statement: Configuration and permission changes shall be traceable
acceptance_criteria: Change history retained for config/permissions

statement: The system shall degrade gracefully under intermittent connectivity
acceptance_criteria: Core tasks continue offline; user informed of sync state

statement: Batch/reporting jobs shall complete within operational windows
acceptance_criteria: Defined batch windows met for reporting workloads

statement: Field devices shall support secure identity and updates
acceptance_criteria: Device identity + signed updates where hardware permits

statement: The system shall support standard spatial data exchange
acceptance_criteria: Import/export GeoJSON/KML/GPX and OGC services
